title: DupeTrace is now AntiDupePro
description: Please switch over to AntiDupePro - Twice as Good!
body: --- DupeTrace has been replaced with [**AntiDupePro**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/antidupepro), because DupeTrace's method of detection does not allow for stacked items to keep working well. If you split a stack, you can't merge it and vice versa. The DupeTrace documentation and source will stay online, because maybe some day a starting dev wants to check out how the soup is made. #### Discord ![flat](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/https://discord.gg/aWMU2JNXex?style=flat) #### Support [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/darkstarworks) [Check out the VERY detailed WIKI pages](https://darkstarworks.gitbook.io/darkstarworks-docs/)
